targets.current_issue: raw/history stats resources and descriptor tables are bundled, but capture/readback execution is still orchestrated by Renderer
targets.next_step: move capture/readback execution helpers behind the RT reflection stats pass boundary without changing frame-contract metrics

targets.current_issue: manifest policy and environment runtime state are separated, but Renderer_Environment still orchestrates loading, residency, and descriptor binding
targets.next_step: move loading/residency orchestration helpers out of Renderer_Environment when environment runtime grows again

targets.current_issue: bloom, temporal-screen, and post controls are separate state boundaries; graph/end-frame orchestration still coordinates them
targets.next_step: keep new post effects inside these state files and move orchestration helpers out of Renderer when touched

targets.current_issue: ECS billboard particles are the public Phase 3 path; GPUParticleSystem remains a separate experimental/future path
targets.next_step: keep the GPU particle path behind an explicit future migration instead of mixing it into the public billboard path
